text: In the first space, I feel a sense of calm and expectation; the clean lines and quiet emptiness invite contemplation, as if I'm waiting for something new to begin. In the second, I am energized and curious—the vibrant colors and bold text pulse with creative purpose. The wall of R+D and the layered displays stir questions about human progress and our relationship with technology. I feel the thrill of possibility and the urge to ponder how spaces and ideas shape experience.
